gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const task=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'); for (const needle of ['## Required implementation','## Required tests','## Acceptance criteria']) { if(!task.includes(needle)) throw new Error('task missing section: '+needle); }" {{taskFile}}

$p='client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts'; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' -Pattern 'evaluateAigcRuntimePolicy' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing evaluateAigcRuntimePolicy in client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' -Pattern 'AIGC_RUNTIME_POLICY_DENIED' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing AIGC_RUNTIME_POLICY_DENIED in client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' -Pattern 'toolCallBudget' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing toolCallBudget in client/src/lib/skills/aigc/aigcSkill.ts' }
